creator: lippe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi farrokhi,

You can see last tinderbox log about my patch to update libupnp:

http://regis.goodking.ca/tb/logs/7-FreeBSD-lippe/upnp-1.6.5,1.log

And please, remember to close ports/119120 PR too.

Or if prefer, tell me for close it.

Thanks.

-- 
lippe@FreeBSD.org
Felippe de Meirelles Motta
